title: The Sewer Network
lines: The air in the sewers is surprisingly cold, carrying the faint, chemical tang of old machinery and stagnant water.
The brick walls are slick with a bioluminescent emerald moss that provides just enough light to see the ripples in the dark water below.
From the darkness ahead, you hear the rhythmic *thrum-thrum* of a massive pump that should have died years ago.

options.desc: 1. Follow the narrow walkway to the left
2. Wades through the shallow water to the right
3. Climb back up the ladder to the square
